metadata.description: /ship — take a feature from idea to merged in one command. Two gates, auto-opening cards, gate notifications, a stage-aware status line, model-routed build, and fresh-agent verification.

plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: /ship — idea to merged in one command: worktree → discover → plan → build → review, gating only on design direction and 'go'. Auto-opening HTML cards, gate desktop notifications, a stage-aware status line, GPT-5.5-first BUILD routing (Opus for the judgment-heavy minority), and fresh-agent verification. Bundles router + verify.
